creator: alex35791113@outlook.com
text:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/debian-ubuntu-jail-encounters-gpg-error-in-freebsd-14-0.90093
It turns out that all files installed by debootstrap had -rwx------ permissions, therefore all other users except root could not execute any programs. After giving execution permissions to programs and libs, everything worked fine. Not sure what kind of bug this is, but FreeBSD is not to blame for this :)
